subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Lord my God! I beseech Thee by Thy most exalted attributes, by Thy Most Great Names, and by Thy most perfect Word [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بصفاتک العلیا و باسمائک الکبری و بکلمتک الاتم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
